Reviews Contact

About Onyx Optometrist

12+ years serving Richmond and surrounding areas

Founded in 2012, Onyx Optometrist has been serving Richmond families with comprehensive eye care services. Dr. Sarah Chen established our practice with a commitment to thorough examinations and lasting patient relationships.

We take time to understand each patient's unique vision needs, whether you're a VCU student needing contact lenses or a Church Hill resident requiring progressive lenses for historic home restoration work.

As active members of the Richmond community, we sponsor youth sports vision screenings and participate in Carytown's annual Health Fair to promote eye health awareness.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Onyx Optometrist

Trusted optometry professionals serving Richmond, VA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.

555-opt-r93
